import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n, m = map(int, input().split())
    A = []
    for _ in range(n):
        row = input().strip()
        A.append([int(c) for c in row])
    
    # prefix sums
    # col_prefix[i][j] = sum of A[0..i-1][j]
    col_prefix = [[0]*(m) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            col_prefix[i+1][j] = col_prefix[i][j] + A[i][j]
    
    ans = float('inf')
    
    for r1 in range(n-4):
        for r2 in range(r1+4, n):
            # inner rows: r1+1 .. r2-1
            # col_zeros[c] = (r2-1 - (r1+1) + 1) - col_ones in inner rows
            inner_len = r2 - r1 - 1
            
            # top_zero[c] = 1 - A[r1][c], bot_zero[c] = 1 - A[r2][c]
            # col_ones_interior[c] = ones in rows r1+1..r2-1 for col c
            # combined[c] = top_zero[c] + bot_zero[c] + col_ones_interior[c]
            
            prefix_combined = [0] * (m+1)
            for c in range(m):
                col_ones = col_prefix[r2][c] - col_prefix[r1+1][c]
                top_z = 1 - A[r1][c]
                bot_z = 1 - A[r2][c]
                prefix_combined[c+1] = prefix_combined[c] + top_z + bot_z + col_ones
            
            # col_zeros[c] = inner_len - (col_prefix[r2][c] - col_prefix[r1+1][c])
            # f(c) = col_zeros[c]
            
            min_val = float('inf')
            for c2 in range(3, m):
                col_ones_c2 = col_prefix[r2][c2] - col_prefix[r1+1][c2]
                f_c2 = inner_len - col_ones_c2
                # g = prefix_combined[c2] - prefix_combined[c1+1] ... wait let me recheck
                # top/bot/interior for cols c1+1..c2-1 = prefix_combined[c2] - prefix_combined[c1+1]
                val_c2 = f_c2 + prefix_combined[c2]
                # need min over c1 <= c2-3 of: f(c1) - prefix_combined[c1+1]
                c1 = c2 - 3
                col_ones_c1 = col_prefix[r2][c1] - col_prefix[r1+1][c1]
                f_c1 = inner_len - col_ones_c1
                candidate = f_c1 - prefix_combined[c1+1]
                if candidate < min_val:
                    min_val = candidate
                if min_val < float('inf'):
                    ans = min(ans, val_c2 + min_val)
    
    print(ans)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
